name: icde-skills
description: A 12-skill depth pack for IEEE ICDE (International Conference on Data Engineering) research-track papers: three-venue routing across SIGMOD/PVLDB/ICDE, the two-round-per-edition calendar, single-blind CMT submission, revise-and-resubmit dynamics, IEEE-format camera-ready and Xplore publication, artifact availability, reproducibility, related work, experiments, and workflow. Grounded in the ICDE 2027 and ICDE 2026 research calls and important-dates pages, the IEEE TCDE award records, and IEEE TKDE relationship, checked on 2026-07-09.
